videos.headline: Cam Ward, Canes storm all the way back to complete wild comeback
videos.description: Cam Ward leads Miami down the field and into the end zone to take the lead and complete the Canes' improbable comeback attempt against Cal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Ward, Canes storm all the way back to complete wild comeback) 2024/10/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miami strike first with quick rushing score vs. Cal
videos.description: Miami breaks the early scoreless tie with a three-yard rushing score by Mark Fletcher Jr. to take a 7-0 lead over Cal.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miami strike first with quick rushing score vs. Cal) 2024/10/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cal's Jack Endries breaks free for 57-yard TD vs. Miami
videos.description: Cal's Jack Endries shakes his defender and gallops down the sideline into the end zone to tie the score at 7-7 against Miami.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cal's Jack Endries breaks free for 57-yard TD vs. Miami) 2024/10/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cal's Jaydn Ott evades a defender on slick rushing TD
videos.description: Jaydn Ott scoots by a defender and punches in a five-yard score to extend Cal's lead over Miami early in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cal's Jaydn Ott evades a defender on slick rushing TD) 2024/10/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cal goes up big after Cam Ward tosses costly pick-six
videos.description: Cam Ward throws an off-balance pass into the hands of Cal defender Miles Williams for a Golden Bears' pick-six to go up 28-10.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cal goes up big after Cam Ward tosses costly pick-six) 2024/10/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cal pads large lead over Miami with quick rushing score
videos.description: Cal continues to pour on the points against Miami after Chandler Rogers keeps it himself and dashes into the end zone for a nine-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cal pads large lead over Miami with quick rushing score) 2024/10/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Miami attempt late rally with rushing TD vs. Cal
videos.description: Miami's Damien Martinez powers into the end zone for a one-yard rushing touchdown to cut down on Cal's lead late in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Miami attempt late rally with rushing TD vs. Cal) 2024/10/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Ward, Miami continue to claw back with quick strike TD
videos.description: Cam Ward zips an 18-yard touchdown pass to Isaiah Horton and brings Miami within two scores of Cal early in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Ward, Miami continue to claw back with quick strike TD) 2024/10/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cam Ward gives Miami late hope with resilient 24-yard score
videos.description: Cam Ward keeps Miami within striking distance of Cal after powering into the end zone on a 24-yard rush late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cam Ward gives Miami late hope with resilient 24-yard score) 2024/10/06 ESHEET
